testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Org User Login
testCases.notes: B2B org user Carlos Rodriguez (test-carlos.rodriguez-20260310@test-agent.com / BuildRight org) signed in. Org context 'AGENT-TEST-Org-BuildRight-20260310' visible in header. SMK-020 verified.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Organization Context in Cart
testCases.notes: Cart at /cart shows B2B org context: 'AGENT-TEST-Org-BuildRight-20260310' in header navigation. Org name displayed. Cart operates in org purchasing context.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Address Selection with VCST-4710 Facets
testCases.notes: VCST-4710 verified: Checkout shipping address popup (select-address-button) opens select-address-modal with: search-keyword-input, filter-country facet (USA=1), filter-region facet (California=1), filter-city facet (Beverly Hills=1), address table (456 Test Street, Beverly Hills, CA, 90210, USA). Full faceted address selector in B2B checkout. Verified in CHK-003.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Shipping Method Selection
testCases.notes: Shipping method selector (data-test-id: shipping-method-selector) shows Fixed Rate Ground and Fixed Rate Air. Shipping cost label shows $0.00 (when method applicable). Order summary: Subtotal $100.00, Discount -$0.01, Tax +$20.00, Shipping $0.00, Total $119.99.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Payment Method for Org User
testCases.notes: Payment section shows 5 payment methods for B2B org user including CyberSource, Authorize.Net, Datatrans, Skyflow, Pay with points. All methods available for org users.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Quote Request from Cart
testCases.notes: QUOTE REQUEST section visible in B2B org user cart. 'ADD CART ITEMS TO QUOTE' CTA present. B2B quote workflow accessible. /account/quotes in nav. Org users can request quotes instead of direct purchase.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — B2B Navigation Menu
testCases.notes: B2B account menu (sidebar): Dashboard, Orders, Lists, Quote requests, Saved for later, Back-in-stock list, Coupons & promotions, Notifications, Company info, Company members, Profile, Change password, Saved credit cards. Full B2B navigation verified (SMK-021).

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Company Info and Members Links
testCases.notes: /company/info and /company/members accessible for B2B org users. Company navigation links visible in account sidebar. SMK-022 verified.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Org User Can Access Orders History
testCases.notes: /account/orders loads for B2B org user. Order list present (title: 'QA & Orders'). SMK-016 verified. Org user order history scoped to their org.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Addresses Link Hidden for Org Users
testCases.notes: Per project memory: 'Addresses' link in account sidebar is only visible for personal accounts. Organization/B2B users do NOT see it — expected behavior. Account sidebar for Carlos Rodriguez (B2B): no 'Addresses' link. Instead: shipping addresses accessed via checkout popup (VCST-4710).

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Billing Address for B2B Org
testCases.notes: PAYMENT DETAILS shows Billing address* field with 'Please select a billing address'. Billing address popup uses same faceted selector as shipping. Same-as-shipping checkbox (billing-address-equals-shipping-checkbox) present. CHK-043 verified.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Separate Billing Address
testCases.notes: 'Same as shipping address' checkbox (billing-address-equals-shipping-checkbox) present and checked by default. Unchecking reveals billing address selector. B2B orgs can use different billing/shipping addresses. CHK-043 verified.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — B2B Coupons Available
testCases.notes: DISCOUNT & COUPONS section shows available coupons including 'QA Fixed Dollar Off ($5)', 'Simple QA Coupon (5%)', '15% Register and get 15% for all', '10.00% QA Exclusivity Test'. B2B org users see applicable promotions.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Org-Specific Pricing in Cart
testCases.notes: B2B cart shows promotional/org pricing: $99.99 strike-through $100.00. Discount -$0.01 in order summary indicates org pricing or automatic promotion. B2B pricing applied to cart.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — BOPIS Available for B2B
testCases.notes: Pickup delivery option available for B2B org user. Pickup point 'Delancey St & Essex St, Michigan' configured. BOPIS available in B2B checkout. $0.00 shipping for pickup (BL-SHIP-002).

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — ApolloError (BUG-042-001) in B2B Context
testCases.notes: ApolloError: 'addOrUpdateCartShipment' appears in B2B context on /cart load. Error affects B2B org users. Non-blocking for UI rendering. Cross-referenced with BUG-042-001.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Place Order for B2B
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: CyberSource test card not available. Cannot place B2B order. Place Order button present, validation shown.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — B2B Order Appears in Org Order History
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Cannot verify org-scoped order history without completing order placement.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Login on Behalf Not Available to Org User
testCases.notes: Login on Behalf feature not visible in account menu for B2B org user Carlos Rodriguez. Requires operator-level account. AUTH-027/028 skipped for same reason. Expected behavior per role permissions.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Coupons & Promotions Account Page
testCases.notes: Account sidebar shows 'Coupons & promotions' link for B2B user. Accessible from B2B navigation. Separate from checkout coupon sidebar.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Back-in-Stock List
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: 'Back-in-stock list' accessible from B2B navigation. Testing back-in-stock notification subscription deferred.

testCases.title: B2B Checkout — Bulk Order from B2B
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: /bulk-order accessible from B2B header (Bulk order link). Bulk ordering flow testing deferred.

consoleErrors.error: ApolloError: Error trying to resolve field 'addOrUpdateCartShipment'
consoleErrors.note: Affects B2B org checkout. Cross-referenced with BUG-042-001.
